CurrentIssues.ID: CognitiveComplexMethod:BookCard.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalFoundationApi::class) @Composable fun BookCard( bookId: String, title: String, coverPath: String?, blurHash: String?, onClick: () -> Unit, authorName: String? = null, duration: String? = null, subtitle: String? = null, progress: Float? = null, timeRemaining: String? = null, isFinished: Boolean = false, isPlaying: Boolean = false, avatarOverlay: AvatarOverlayData? = null, isInSelectionMode: Boolean = false, isSelected: Boolean = false, onLongPress: (() -> Unit)? = null, cardWidth: Dp? = null, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

CognitiveComplexMethod:SyncTestApplication.kt$internal fun withTestApplication( heartbeatIntervalMillis: Long? = null, userScoped: Boolean = false, playbackPositions: Boolean = false, playbackEvents: Boolean = false, block: suspend SyncTestScope.() -> Unit, )
ComplexCondition:AudioRoutes.kt$exp == null || sig == null || userId == null || !signer.verify(userId, bookId, fileId, exp, sig)
ComplexCondition:BuildMp4File.kt$MoovBuilder$patched[i] == stcoMarker[0] && patched[i + 1] == stcoMarker[1] && patched[i + 2] == stcoMarker[2] && patched[i + 3] == stcoMarker[3]

LongMethod:BookCard.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalFoundationApi::class) @Composable fun BookCard( bookId: String, title: String, coverPath: String?, blurHash: String?, onClick: () -> Unit, authorName: String? = null, duration: String? = null, subtitle: String? = null, progress: Float? = null, timeRemaining: String? = null, isFinished: Boolean = false, isPlaying: Boolean = false, avatarOverlay: AvatarOverlayData? = null, isInSelectionMode: Boolean = false, isSelected: Boolean = false, onLongPress: (() -> Unit)? = null, cardWidth: Dp? = null, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

NoHardcodedUiString:ABSImportHubScreen.kt$"Are you sure you want to delete \"${import.name}\"? This cannot be undone."
NoHardcodedUiString:ABSImportHubScreen.kt$"Choose how to create a new import:"
NoHardcodedUiString:ABSImportHubScreen.kt$"This will delete the stuck import. You can create a new one afterwards."
NoHardcodedUiString:ABSImportHubScreen.kt$text = "Analysis was likely interrupted. Cancel and try again."
NoHardcodedUiString:ABSImportHubScreen.kt$text = "Create a new import from an Audiobookshelf backup to get started."
NoHardcodedUiString:ABSImportHubScreen.kt$text = "Select a backup file from your device"
NoHardcodedUiString:ABSImportScreen.kt$text = "Choose what to import from the Audiobookshelf backup."
NoHardcodedUiString:ABSImportScreen.kt$text = "Import listening history from an Audiobookshelf backup."
NoHardcodedUiString:ABSImportScreen.kt$text = "Match Audiobookshelf books to your ListenUp library."
NoHardcodedUiString:ABSUploadSheet.kt$text = "Upload your Audiobookshelf backup to migrate listening history and progress."
NoHardcodedUiString:ABSUploadSheet.kt$text = "Your backup has been uploaded and analyzed."
NoHardcodedUiString:AdminBackupScreen.kt$"Are you sure you want to delete ${backup.id}? This cannot be undone."
NoHardcodedUiString:AdminBackupScreen.kt$"Are you sure you want to delete \"${import.name}\"? This cannot be undone."
NoHardcodedUiString:AdminBackupScreen.kt$text = "Create a backup to protect your data"
NoHardcodedUiString:AdminCategoriesScreen.kt$"No other genres available as a merge target."
NoHardcodedUiString:AdminCategoriesScreen.kt$text = "No other genres available — only 'Top level' is possible."
NoHardcodedUiString:ChapterNameReviewSheet.kt$text = "Audible names replace your chapter labels. Timings stay the same."
NoHardcodedUiString:EditProfileScreen.kt$text = "A short bio that appears on your profile"
NoHardcodedUiString:EditProfileScreen.kt$text = "Set a new password for your account"
NoHardcodedUiString:LibrarySetupScreen.kt$text = "Select one or more folders where your audiobooks are stored."
NoHardcodedUiString:LibrarySetupScreen.kt$text = "This folder has no subfolders. You can select it as a library location."
NoHardcodedUiString:LibrarySetupScreen.kt$text = "Your audiobooks will be scanned and available shortly."
NoHardcodedUiString:MatchPreviewScreen.kt$text = "${suggestion.rows.size} Audible chapters match — review and apply."
NoHardcodedUiString:RestoreBackupScreen.kt$text = "All existing data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone."
NoHardcodedUiString:RestoreBackupScreen.kt$text = "Choose how to restore from this backup."
NoHardcodedUiString:RestoreBackupScreen.kt$text = "How should conflicts be handled when an item exists in both the backup and your current data?"
NoHardcodedUiString:RestoreBackupScreen.kt$text = "Please confirm you want to proceed with the restore."
NoHardcodedUiString:RestoreBackupScreen.kt$text = "Preview what will happen during the restore."
NoHardcodedUiString:UnmappedGenresScreen.kt$"No live genres available. Create one in Admin → Categories first."
NoHardcodedUiString:UnmappedGenresScreen.kt$text = "Every genre string from your scanner has been mapped or auto-resolved."
ThrowsCount:AtomWalker.kt$AtomWalker$fun readHeader( bytes: ByteArray, offset: Int, end: Int = bytes.size, ): Atom

UseIfInsteadOfWhen:JvmStoragePaths.kt$JvmStoragePaths$when { "windows" in os -> { val appData = System.getenv("APPDATA") ?: "${System.getProperty("user.home")}/AppData/Roaming" File(appData, "ListenUp") } else -> { // Linux and others: XDG Base Directory Specification val xdgData = System.getenv("XDG_DATA_HOME") ?: "${System.getProperty("user.home")}/.local/share" File(xdgData, "listenup") } }

UseIfInsteadOfWhen:JvmStoragePaths.kt$JvmStoragePaths$when { "windows" in os -> { val localAppData = System.getenv("LOCALAPPDATA") ?: "${System.getProperty("user.home")}/AppData/Local" File(localAppData, "ListenUp/cache") } else -> { val xdgCache = System.getenv("XDG_CACHE_HOME") ?: "${System.getProperty("user.home")}/.cache" File(xdgCache, "listenup") } }
